name: Mini Shrimp Quiche
recipeIngredient: 24 small fresh shrimp, peeled, deveined and cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease 24 (1 3/4 inch) muffin tins.
2. Separate each dinner roll in half and press into muffin cups.
3. Place one shrimp in each shell.
4. Combine egg, cream, brandy, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
5. Divide the mixture evenly among the shells using about 2 teaspoons for each.
6. Top with shredded cheese.
7. Bake at 375 degrees for 20 minutes, until golden.
8. Cool and freeze.
9. To serve, place frozen appetizers on a baking sheet and bake at 375 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes. Makes 2 dozen. This little crust idea is great! Use it for all your little mini-tarts.
